title: SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: INTERMOUNTAIN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs and the school districts serving them, including IEP support and transition services. 2001 SW Nye Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Children with special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 966-3148 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 966-3148 Director of Special Education Corrina Robinson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker, Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING INFORMATION SERVICES - BLUE MOUNTAIN EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INTERMOUNTAIN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
